title: deprea altomayoensis
intro: Deprea altomayoensis, also known as the altomayo deprea, is a plant species in the Solanaceae family that is native to the Andes mountains in South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The altomayo deprea has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of altomayo deprea include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from the leaves and roots of the plant, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
